finding: R2: 48-53c/50-53c trigger-family fill zone is fee-dead; cap buyable region below ~0.50

pooled_50_53.note: exact reproduction from trades_unified.json with independent code and independent 1h-block bootstrap (6000 reps, seed 99)

trigger_family_ge50.reconciliation: they additionally require settledBy startswith 'polymarket'; my extra 4 are feed-provisional settles - same story either way
trigger_family_ge50.note: Wilson CI upper bound .5251 < breakeven .5416 reproduced; era-stable negative

integrity_checks.epoch_units: at(ms)/1000 - t0(s) in [0,320] for all 3576; entrySec consistent within 10s for all
integrity_checks.entry_field: entry = ask + 0.01 verified on all rows (slip field stored in cents)
integrity_checks.outcome_vs_coinbase_candle: 398/436 zone results agree with open(t0) vs open(t0+300) proxy; all 38 disagreements are actual-Polymarket settles (known ~97% proxy agreement), no candle gaps, no ties in zone
integrity_checks.survivorship: 81 excluded trades = 8 open + 3 pending + 70 result='stopped' (stop-loss exits, all negative pnl, 11 in zone with entries .50-.52); excluding these realized LOSSES makes the zone look BETTER, i.e., bias runs AGAINST the finding, conservative
integrity_checks.tie_handling: dropping all <1bp-|move| trades (n=36) makes zone EV MORE negative (-7.04c, n=400); 3 exact-tie opens settled by PM, 1 win among them
integrity_checks.ledger_rotation: no duplicate keys across _src merges; per-day zone coverage continuous Jul 7-13

prespecification_check.evidence: 2026-07-10-edge-hunt/FINAL-DESIGN.md section 4.2 (MF2) fixes bucket hi = p_eff in [0.50,0.53] and declares 'the entire hi bucket is unsized at launch'; a bucket-divergence alarm and day-60 cap verdict are pre-registered; line 87 records the pm-matched 'fillable q .4516 vs unfillable .7692' direction as an open dispute BEFORE this round's data
prespecification_check.consequence: the 50-53c zone is the pre-registered disputed bucket, not a this-round scan winner; the worst-of-K=13 multiplicity attack does not apply to the bucket choice. Neighboring buckets 50-55 and 55-60 are also independently significantly negative (pooled EV CIs entirely <0), so 50-53 is not an isolated cell

weaknesses_found: DEDUP ESTIMAND: the 436 zone trades collapse to 259 unique (t0,side) signals (59 intervals traded both sides); dedup q=.5019, EV -2.62c/sh, my block-boot CI [-6.77,+1.25], p(>=0)=.091. The -6.26c per-trade figure up-weights intervals where multiple (mostly retired momentum) engines piled on. A single go-forward engine trading each unique signal once at ~51c is point-negative but NOT independently significant. Trigger-family ge50 dedup: n=85, -7.25c, CI [-18.74,+3.76], p=.099. The per-trade block bootstrap is still valid for its own estimand (same-hour engine pile-ons stay inside blocks).

REPLICATION GROUP IMPURITY: 11 of 12 'expensive cap-missed' records in misses_btc also failed the 'Near open' guard (bot line 685: early = left >= revWinMin), i.e., the snapshot was taken AFTER the 45s entry window closed. They are not clean 'signal fillable-in-window but ask>cap' cases; the pure cap-only subset is n=1. The 15/35-vs-10/12 Fisher p=.016 reproduces exactly and survives restricting to the same time span (p=.020), but it should be read as suggestive corroboration of the genuinely pre-specified direction, not independent confirmation.

BOUNDARY PLACEMENT: the direct lt50-vs-ge50 trigger-family contrast is p=.071 (analyst's own number, reproduced in spirit: my rev_lt50 EV +3.57c CI includes 0). 'Cap below ~0.50' rests on the pre-registered bucket edge plus every >=50c estimand failing to clear fees, not on a significant cheap-vs-expensive contrast.
per_engine_zone_check: every engine that traded the zone has negative EV (loose -2.9c n=106, value -12.6c n=62, reversal -11.4c n=41, reversal2 -11.8c n=39, impulse50 -21.7c n=13, reversal_v2 -15.0c n=16, latentfire -23.9c n=7); not a single-engine artifact
bottom_line: Headline statistics reproduce exactly from raw data; no lookahead (all inputs are realized fills and settlements); survivorship and tie handling bias AGAINST the claim if anything; bucket genuinely pre-specified in the prior round. The action (revEntryMax 0.4999 on flat arms, keep hi bucket unsized) is asymmetric: it requires the zone to PROVE it clears q*=.5282-.5474, and no estimand (per-trade, dedup, per-engine, per-era) comes anywhere near clearing. Honest effect: -6.3c/sh per-trade pooled (significant); -2.6c/sh per-unique-signal (p=.09, not independently significant); trigger-family >=50c -7 to -9c/sh era-stable with Wilson q CI below breakeven.
